lines: Pannbiff med bakad lök, gräddsås, rårörda lingon, timjanrostad potatis

rostade jordnötter, rostade sesamfrö & jasminris

lines: Ayam Gorale — Grilled quarter of a chicken, coconut milk, homemade curry paste, peanuts, spicy julienne salad.
Pad Thai — Udon noodles (wheat), garlic, chives, tofu, (egg), bean sprouts, peanuts. (Thai)
Slow-Roasted Beef Chuck — Stir-fried with onion, spring onion, chili, bell peppers, cashew nuts.
